reviews.comment:
Estaba limpiando los vidrios de mi camioneta ya q no se me ofreció el servicio.  Y dos de los chicos q despachan el combustible q no pude identificar, se molestaron por q había caído agua al piso. No intento hacer una polémica de eso solo q tuve q hacer yo lo q según ellos hacían y no hicieron . Por q les ensuciaba el piso q se ve q tampoco querían limpiar. Les ofreci limpiarlo yo y se volvieron a reír de forma burlesca y me dijeron anda viejo nomas. Esto fue el dia 19/1/2026 a las 9 hs . Estos dos muchachos no representan el espíritu del ACA ni de ypf . Lamento haberlos encontrado.

(Translated by Google)
I was cleaning my truck's windows since they didn't offer me the service. Two of the guys who pump the gas, whom I couldn't identify, got annoyed because some water had spilled on the floor. I'm not trying to make a fuss about it, I just had to do what they claimed to be doing but weren't. It was because it made the floor dirty, which they clearly didn't want to clean either. I offered to clean it myself, and they laughed mockingly and told me to go ahead and do it. This happened on January 19, 2026, at 9:00 AM. These two guys don't represent the spirit of the ACA or YPF. I regret having encountered them.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8983193634567568949/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2taMFpFRnNla3RMVWw5WmNXZG5TbTVRTVZoUlRWRRAB
